title: Build a Heart Icon
description: An SVG heart icon built from scratch using core SVG attributes. A path element defines the heart shape using a d attribute with vector drawing commands, while the viewBox sets the coordinate space and the fill attribute colors it red — all inline in HTML, without any external icon library.
objectives: Understand how SVG elements work inside an HTML document
Use the viewBox attribute to define the SVG coordinate system
Set width and height attributes to control icon size
Use a path element with a d attribute to draw a custom shape
Apply the fill attribute to color an SVG element
